AC1.description: Vite + React project scaffolded under /frontend with TypeScript

AC2.description: Dashboard page: lists forms from GET /api/forms
AC2.evidence: frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx - calls listForms() from api.ts, renders GOV.UK table

AC3.description: Upload page: GOV.UK file-upload posts PDF to POST /api/forms/upload
AC3.evidence: frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx - govuk-file-upload input, posts via uploadPdf() FormData

AC4.description: After upload, redirects to form editor page for the new form

AC5.description: Form editor page: displays field list from draft schema
AC5.evidence: frontend/src/pages/EditorPage.tsx - calls getForm(), renders FieldRow for each field

AC6.evidence: EditorPage.tsx FieldRow: govuk-input for label, govuk-select for type, govuk-checkboxes for required

AC7.description: Add field button: adds new field row with defaults
AC7.evidence: EditorPage.tsx handleAddField() uses uuid() to add new field, focuses label input

AC8.evidence: EditorPage.tsx handleDelete() calls window.confirm() before removing field

AC9.evidence: EditorPage.tsx handleSave() → saveFields() → PUT /api/forms/:formId/fields; backend route added in backend/src/routes/forms.ts

AC10.evidence: govuk-input, govuk-select, govuk-checkboxes, govuk-button, govuk-file-upload classes used throughout

AC11.description: All inputs have visible labels with correct htmlFor/id association
AC11.evidence: All inputs have matching id/htmlFor pairs; checkboxes use fieldset/legend

AC12.description: GOV.UK page structure: header, phase banner, back link, main, footer
AC12.evidence: frontend/src/components/GovLayout.tsx - skip link, govuk-header, phase-banner, back link, main, footer

AC13.description: Error display: inline errors under fields on save failure
AC13.evidence: EditorPage.tsx: govuk-error-summary + govuk-error-message per field; UploadPage.tsx same pattern

AC14.description: Loading state: disable save button while saving
AC14.evidence: EditorPage.tsx: disabled={saving} aria-disabled={saving} on save button; text changes to 'Saving…'

AC15.description: Full keyboard navigation through all controls
AC15.evidence: All controls are native HTML elements with visible labels; focus management on add/delete; skip link; no div-click traps
